entry.title: Claude Code
entry.description: Anthropic command-line coding agent for codebase questions, edits, tests, and terminal-centered development tasks.
entry.seoDescription: Claude Code is Anthropic's terminal coding agent for codebase questions, edits, tests, and development workflows.
entry.author: Anthropic
entry.cardDescription: Terminal coding agent for Claude-powered development.
entry.body:
## Editorial notes

Claude Code is a core reference point for agentic coding workflows and fits teams that already live in the terminal.

## Disclosure

Editorial listing. No paid placement or affiliate link is used.
